Title: YouTube Content Strategist
Description:
Location: In-Office

Compensation: $80,000 - $90,000 CAD Base Salary + $18,000 variable

About Martell Group

The Martell Group exists to build people, brands, and ventures that create meaningful impact. Across our four companies, we combine audience, operators, and execution to launch scalable products and empower ambitious leaders in Media, B2B SaaS, and AI.

Founded by serial entrepreneur and investor Dan Martell (investor in Udemy, Intercom, and Unbounce), we’re building a company that values leadership, growth, and simplicity, and we’re looking for people who live those values too.

Our goal is to attract world-class talent and align people where their impact is greatest. When you apply to Martell Group, you’ll automatically be considered for all open roles across our companies, not just the one you applied for.

Why you shouldn't work here – Radical Transparency from our CEO

About the Role

We are looking for an experienced YouTube Content Strategist to lead the creative strategy behind a world-class YouTube channel. This is not an execution-only role. We need someone who deeply understands YouTube storytelling, audience psychology, content analytics, and channel growth, and can confidently tell us what needs to change in order to reach the next level.

You will be responsible for developing high-performing video concepts, analyzing channel performance, writing compelling scripts, and building a content strategy designed to generate millions of views while driving business growth. You should have a proven understanding of what makes viewers click, watch, engage, and return.

The ideal candidate has significant experience with YouTube content creation and understands the difference between creating videos and building a successful channel. This person will become a key creative partner to Dan, helping shape content strategy, improve storytelling, and potentially participate in content production and filming.

Candidates with backgrounds in film production, directing, documentary filmmaking, scriptwriting, or other storytelling-focused disciplines are strongly encouraged to apply.

Responsibilities

Content Strategy & Channel Growth


Develop and execute a long-term YouTube content strategy aligned with audience growth and business objectives.
Identify high-potential content opportunities capable of generating significant viewership and engagement.
Research trends, competitors, audience interests, and emerging opportunities within the YouTube ecosystem.
Build content roadmaps and publishing strategies that support sustainable channel growth.


Ideation & Creative Development


Generate original video concepts with strong viral and evergreen potential.
Develop video ideas designed to achieve high click-through rates, audience retention, and viewer engagement.
Create content frameworks that balance entertainment, education, storytelling, and business goals.
Lead brainstorming sessions and continuously test new content formats and creative approaches.


Scriptwriting & Storytelling


Write and refine compelling video scripts, outlines, and story structures.
Craft strong hooks, narrative arcs, pacing strategies, and calls-to-action.
Ensure every piece of content is optimized to maximize audience retention and watch time.
Elevate the overall storytelling quality of the channel.


Analytics & Optimization


Analyze channel performance, audience behavior, and video-level analytics.
Use data to identify growth opportunities and improve future content performance.
Monitor key metrics including click-through rate, retention, watch time, subscriber conversion, and audience engagement.
Translate insights into actionable recommendations for content, packaging, and production improvements.


Creative Leadership


Act as a strategic advisor on all YouTube content decisions.
Provide recommendations on what content, messaging, and formats should evolve as the channel grows.
Collaborate closely with Dan and the broader content team to improve content quality and performance.
Potentially assist with filming, directing, or content production as needed.


Qualifications

Required


3+ years of experience developing, producing, or managing YouTube content with demonstrated results.
Strong understanding of YouTube analytics, audience retention, click-through optimization, and channel growth strategies.
Proven experience writing scripts and developing high-performing video concepts.
Exceptional storytelling instincts and understanding of audience psychology.
Ability to identify trends while balancing evergreen content opportunities.
Strong analytical skills with the ability to turn data into strategic recommendations.
Excellent communication and creative leadership abilities.


Preferred


Experience working with creator brands, personal brands, media companies, or educational content channels.
Background in film production, directing, screenwriting, documentary production, journalism, or related storytelling fields.
Experience helping grow a YouTube channel from early-stage to significant audience scale.
Familiarity with production workflows, filming, and creative direction.
Personal content creation experience or successful management of a YouTube channel is considered a strong asset.

Title: SOC Analyst
Description:
Job Description

Fortinet is looking for a Security Operations Centre (SOC) Analyst to be part of the FortiCloud SOC-as-a-Service team. This is a highly technical role, monitoring security events, identifying threats, assessing risks, and working with customers globally to improve their security posture.

FortiCloud SOC-as-a-Service team operates based on a follow the sun approach. Working hours for this position includes 5 days/40 hours per week, consisting of 1 weekend and 4 weekdays (e.g. Sunday – Thursday or Tuesday – Saturday), 9am – 5pm.

Responsibilities:


Monitor SOC alerts to detect potential threats
Use threat intelligence feeds, triage alerts and filter out false-positives
Create custom reports, dashboards, and execute log searches to support investigations and customer’s requirements
Work with customers and Forensic analysis team to contain and eradicate incidents if need be
Follow Incident Response playbooks, processes and procedures and help to improve them
Create/Update use case detections to detect new threats from raw logs
Create/Update playbooks to automate repetitive triage steps


Requirements:


Understanding of SOC operations and Incident Response Life cycle.
Understanding of Cyber Kill chain, threat vectors and threat intelligence
Understanding of layered security at data, OS and network levels
Understanding Cybersecurity Frameworks
Hands-on experience with security log analysis such as AV, IPS, Anti-Spam logs
Hands-on experience with visualization, reporting technologies
Hands-on experience with PostgreSQL, regular expressions
Hands-on experience with Network Security technologies such as Firewalls, SIEM, Sandbox
Hands-on experience with Linux and Windows system administration.
Previous working experience with Fortinet products is a bonus.
Team player, solution-focused, conflict management skills
Self-directed, takes initiatives
Open to new challenges and learning opportunities
Understands the importance of discipline, consistency and communication
Good verbal and written communication skills
Cybersecurity certifications such as GCIA, GCIH, GMON, GSOC, CEH, Security+ is a bonus
Graduates from IT degrees, or mid-career IT professionals with certifications in cybersecurity may apply
Must be authorized to work in the U.S. without sponsorship


About Our Team:

Join our team, known for its collaborative ethos, working seamlessly with global customers, internal engineering teams and product development groups. Our team culture emphasizes continuous learning, innovation, and a strong commitment to customer satisfaction. We embrace Fortinet’s core values of openness, teamwork and innovation, fostering an environment where team members support each other, share knowledge, and leverage AI to solve complex technical challenges. Our inclusive and dynamic team thrives on collaboration and is driven by the shared goal of maintaining Fortinet’s high standards of excellence in cybersecurity solutions.

Why Join Us:

We encourage candidates from all backgrounds and identities to apply. We offer a supportive work environment and a competitive Total Rewards package to support you with your overall health and financial well-being. Embark on a challenging, enjoyable, and rewarding career journey with Fortinet. Join us in bringing solutions that make a meaningful and lasting impact to our 660,000+ customers around the globe.

The Canada base salary range for this full-time position is expected to be between $111,900 - $136,700 annually. Wage ranges are based on various factors including the labour market, job type, and job level. Exact salary offers will be determined by factors such as the candidate’s subject knowledge, skill level, qualifications, and experience.

Fortinet strives to provide you and your family with a comprehensive benefits package. Benefits eligibility starts on your first day of hire and comprises of 100% company paid medical, dental, and vision coverage, including a Health Spending Account and a Personal Spending Account that gives you flexibility to spend where you need it the most. Our Employee & Family Assistance Plan (EFAP) offers you and your family access to various services like counseling, legal advice, mental health resources etc. We also provide critical illness, disability, and life insurance, as well as a Group Registered Retirement Savings Plan (RRSP) with a company match to help you save faster for retirement. We offer competitive Paid Time Off and flexible leave policies, including paid health days, to help you take care of yourself and your family members.

All roles are eligible to participate in the Fortinet equity program. Bonus eligibility is reviewed at time of hire and annually at the Company’s discretion.
